message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="나머지 폼 교체 에이전트">
너는 noisetest1-convert 팀의 나머지 폼 교체 에이전트야. Task #3을 수행해.

프로젝트 경로: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\리크 검사기 신진&엔케이\신진\
참조 문서: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\converttp\NI컨트롤_교체_문서.md, C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\converttp\FlexCell-to-DataGridView.md

## 교체 공통 규칙:
- `AxCWUIControlsLib.AxCWButton` (버튼용) → `System.Windows.Forms.Button` (FlatStyle=Flat)
- `NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms.NumericEdit` → `System.Windows.Forms.NumericUpDown`
- `FlexCell.Grid` → `System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`
- 이벤트: `ClickEvent` → `Click`
- NumericEdit: `.Value` (Double) → NumericUpDown `.Value` (Decimal, CDbl/CInt로 변환)
- OcxState 제거, BeginInit/EndInit NI/FlexCell 관련 제거
- 각 Designer.vb의 선언부와 InitializeComponent() 모두 수정

## 대상 폼 목록:

### 1. FrmPart (Designer.vb 113줄, .vb 329줄)
- Grid1 (FlexCell.Grid, 29컬럼) → DataGridView
- axcButtonADd, axcButtonDelete, axcButtonSAve, axcButtonClose → Button
- InitGrid(): FlexCell 컬럼/스타일 → DataGridView Columns 수동 정의
- LoadGrid(): Grid1.AddItem(탭구분) → dgv.Rows.Add(값배열)
- SaveGrid(): Grid1.Cell(i,c).Text → dgv.Rows(i-1).Cells(c).Value
- Grid1_MouseClick: Grid1.Selection.FirstRow → dgv.CurrentCell.RowIndex

### 2. FrmSearch (Designer.vb 192줄, .vb 74줄)
- Grid3 (FlexCell.Grid) → DataGridView
- AxCWButton1, axcButtonSAve, axcButtonClose → Button

### 3. FrmSearch2 (Designer.vb 214줄, .vb 67줄)
- Grid3 (FlexCell.Grid) → DataGridView
- AxCWButton1, axcButtonSAve, axcButtonClose → Button

### 4. FrmPassWord (Designer.vb 71줄, .vb 11줄)
- axcButtonBasic → Button

### 5. FrmTest (Designer.vb 149줄, .vb 139줄)
- NumTest, NumDelay (NumericEdit) → NumericUpDown (DecimalPlaces=0, Font=Arial Narrow 22pt Bold)
- ascButtonTest, ascButtonExit → Button
- .vb에서 NumTest.Value, NumDelay.Value 사용 시 Decimal→CDbl/CInt 필요

### 6. FrmSeq (Designer.vb 281줄, .vb 849줄)
- FlexCell.Grid → DataGridView
- FlexCell API 전부 DataGridView로 변환
- ComboBox 셀이 있으면 DataGridViewComboBoxColumn으로

### 7. FrmSet (Designer.vb + .vb) — NI컨트롤_교체_문서.md 참조
- AxCWButton1 (저장), ascButtonExit (종료) → Button
- 26개 NumericEdit → NumericUpDown (Size=97x26, Increment=0.1, DecimalPlaces=1, Font=Arial Narrow 12pt Bold)
- .vb에서 Value 사용 시 CDbl 변환

### 8. FrmSIgnal (Designer.vb + .vb) — NI컨트롤_교체_문서.md 참조
- axcButtonSAve, axcButtonClose, AxCWButton1, AxCWButton2 → Button
- SOl1Num, SOl2Num (NumericEdit) → NumericUpDown (Increment=0.1, DecimalPlaces=1, Font=Arial Narrow 18pt Bold)
- .vb에서 SOl1Num.Value, SOl2Num.Value → CDbl 변환

각 폼의 Designer.vb와 .vb를 읽고 수정해라. 작업 완료 후 TaskUpdate로 Task #3을 completed로 마크해라.
</teammate-message>

1→# NI 컨트롤 교체 작업 문서
     2→
     3→## 교체 규칙
     4→| NI 컨트롤 | 교체 대상 | 비고 |
     5→|---|---|---|
     6→| AxCWButton | **Label** (BackColor=Gray, ForeColor=Black) | 클릭 이벤트 → Label.Click 으로 변경 |
     7→| ScatterGraph | **ZedGraphControl** | X/Y축 범위, 플롯 동일하게 |
     8→| NumericEdit | **NumericUpDown** | DecimalPlaces=1, Increment=0.1 |
     9→
    10→---
    11→
    12→## 1. FrmMain — 가장 많은 NI 컨트롤 (약 96개)
    13→
    14→### 1-1. AxCWButton → Label (약 70개)
    15→
    16→#### 상태 LED (6개) — 25×25 크기
    17→| 이름 | 용도 |
    18→|---|---|
    19→| LedScanner | 스캐너 연결 상태 |
    20→| LedPrinter | 프린터 연결 상태 |
    21→| LedDIO | DIO 연결 상태 |
    22→| LedDIO2 | DIO2 연결 상태 |
    23→| LedDAQ | DAQ 연결 상태 |
    24→| LedSUpply | 공급 상태 |
    25→
    26→#### 셀 타입 표시 (1개) — 352×88
    27→| 이름 | 용도 |
    28→|---|---|
    29→| lbCellType | 현재 셀 타입 표시 |
    30→
    31→#### 메뉴/동작 버튼 (6개)
    32→| 이름 | 용도 | 크기 |
    33→|---|---|---|
    34→| ascButtonTest | 검사 시작 | 161×49 |
    35→| ascButtonExit | 종료 | 161×49 |
    36→| AxcButtonCountReset | 카운트 리셋 | - |
    37→| axcButtonSearch | 검색 | - |
    38→| axcButtonSIgnal | 신호 | - |
    39→| ascButtonTestSearch | 내구시험 검색 | - |
    40→
    41→#### 1차 테스트 표시 (약 20개)
    42→| 패턴 | 이름 | 용도 |
    43→|---|---|---|
    44→| 라벨 | _1st_Lb1 ~ _1st_Lb6 | 1차 테스트 회차 번호 |
    45→| 전류값 | src1Amp1 ~ src1Amp6 | 1차 전류 측정값 표시 |
    46→| 소음값 | src1Noise1 ~ src1Noise6 | 1차 소음 측정값 표시 |
    47→| 판정 | src1AmpDec, src1NoiseDec | 1차 전류/소음 판정 |
    48→| 기타 | AxCWButton13 | - |
    49→
    50→#### 2차 테스트 표시 (약 6개)
    51→| 이름 | 용도 |
    52→|---|---|
    53→| src2Noise / src2NoiseSpec / src2NoiseDec | 2차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
    54→| src2Flow / src2FlowSpec / src2FlowDec | 2차 유량 측정/스펙/판정 |
    55→
    56→#### 3차 테스트 표시 (약 9개)
    57→| 이름 | 용도 |
    58→|---|---|
    59→| src3Noise / src3NoiseSpec / src3NoiseDec | 3차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
    60→| src3Flow / src3FlowSpec / src3FlowDec | 3차 유량 측정/스펙/판정 |
    61→| src3Amp / src3AmpSpec / src3AmpDec | 3차 전류 측정/스펙/판정 |
    62→
    63→#### 4차 테스트 표시 (약 9개)
    64→| 이름 | 용도 |
    65→|---|---|
    66→| src4Noise / src4NoiseSpec / src4NoiseDec | 4차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
    67→| src4Flow / src4FlowSpec / src4FlowDec | 4차 유량(공압) 측정/스펙/판정 |
    68→| src4Amp / src4AmpSpec / src4AmpDec | 4차 전류 측정/스펙/판정 |
    69→
    70→#### 5차 테스트 표시 (약 6개)
    71→| 이름 | 용도 |
    72→|---|---|
    73→| src5Noise / src5NoiseSpec / src5NoiseDec | 5차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
    74→| src5Flow / src5FlowSpec / src5FlowDec | 5차 유량(공압) 측정/스펙/판정 |
    75→
    76→#### 기타 라벨용 (약 10개)
    77→| 이름 |
    78→|---|
    79→| AxCWButton7, 11, 14, 15, 21, 22, 23, 24, 26, 27 |
    80→
    81→### 1-2. ScatterGraph → ZedGraphControl (12개)
    82→
    83→| 그래프 이름 | Caption | 크기 | Y축 범위 | X축 범위 (런타임) | 플롯 |
    84→|---|---|---|---|---|---|
    85→| srcGraph1Amp | 전류(A) | 763×154 | 0 ~ 1.0 | 0 ~ (_1TestTime*6+8) | ScatterPlot14 + ScatterPlot1 |
    86→| srcGraph1Noise | 소음(dB) | 763×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_1TestTime*6+8) | ScatterPlot13 + ScatterPlot4 |
    87→| srcGraph2Flow | 유량(L/min) | 763×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_2TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot16 + ScatterPlot8 |
    88→| srcGraph2Noise | 소음(dB) | 763×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_2TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot15 + ScatterPlot7 |
    89→| srcGraph3Flow | 유량(L/min) | 252×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_3TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot19 + ScatterPlot2 |
    90→| srcGraph3Noise | 소음(dB) | 505×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_3TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot18 + ScatterPlot3 |
    91→| srcGraph3Amp | 전류(A) | 252×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_3TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot17 + ScatterPlot5 |
    92→| srcGraph4Flow | 공압(bar) | 252×154 | 0 ~ 1000.0 | 0 ~ (_4TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot22 + ScatterPlot10 |
    93→| srcGraph4Noise | 소음(dB) | 505×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_4TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot21 + ScatterPlot9 |
    94→| srcGraph4Amp | (없음) | (없음) | 0 ~ 1.0 | 0 ~ (_4TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot20 + ScatterPlot6 |
    95→| srcGraph5Flow | 공압(bar) | 510×154 | 0 ~ 1000.0 | 0 ~ (_5TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot24 + ScatterPlot12 |
    96→| srcGraph5Noise | 소음(dB) | 505×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_5TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot23 + ScatterPlot11 |
    97→
    98→#### 그래프 공통 설정 (ZedGraph에 반영 필요)
    99→- Border: Raised → ZedGraph Border 설정
   100→- CaptionFont: Arial Narrow 12pt Bold → Title.FontSpec
   101→- PlotAreaColor: White → Chart.Fill = White
   102→- PlotLine: Black, Width=2.0 → LineItem Color=Black, Width=2.0F
   103→- XAxis MajorDivisions.Interval=1.0 → XAxis.Scale.MajorStep=1.0
   104→- YAxis MajorDivisions.Interval=2.0 → YAxis.Scale.MajorStep=2.0
   105→- Grid: Visible, Color=RGB(224,224,224) → XAxis/YAxis.MajorGrid.Color
   106→
   107→#### XYCursor (10개) — ZedGraph에서는 불필요 또는 커스텀 구현
   108→| 이름 | 연결 Plot |
   109→|---|---|
   110→| XyCursor1~5 | ScatterPlot1 (1차 전류 그래프) |
   111→| XyCursor6~10 | ScatterPlot4 (1차 소음 그래프) |
   112→
   113→#### XYRangeAnnotation (10개) → ZedGraph BoxObj로 교체
   114→| 이름 | 용도 | X범위 (런타임) | Y범위 (런타임) |
   115→|---|---|---|---|
   116→| Range1Amp | 1차 전류 스펙 | — | — |
   117→| Range1Noise | 1차 소음 스펙 | — | — |
   118→| Range2Flow | 2차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_2TestTime-0.5) | _2FlowMin ~ _2FlowMax |
   119→| Range2Noise | 2차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_2TestTime-0.5) | _2NoiseMin ~ _2NoiseMax |
   120→| Range3Flow | 3차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_3TestTime-0.5) | _3FlowMin ~ _3FlowMax |
   121→| Range3Noise | 3차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_3TestTime-0.5) | _3NoiseMin ~ _3NoiseMax |
   122→| Range3Amp | 3차 전류 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_3TestTime-0.5) | _3AmpMin ~ _3AmpMax |
   123→| Range4Flow | 4차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_4TestTime-0.5) | _4FlowMin ~ _4FlowMax |
   124→| Range4Noise | 4차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_4TestTime-0.5) | _4NoiseMin ~ _4NoiseMax |
   125→| Range4Amp | 4차 전류 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_4TestTime-0.5) | _4AmpMin ~ _4AmpMax |
   126→| Range5Flow | 5차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_5TestTime-0.5) | _5FlowMin ~ _5FlowMax |
   127→| Range5Noise | 5차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_5TestTime-0.5) | _5NoiseMin ~ _5NoiseMax |
   128→
   129→> RangeAnnotation 공통: ArrowVisible=False, CaptionVisible=False, RangeFillStyle=None, RangeLineColor=Red
   130→> → ZedGraph BoxObj: Border.Color=Red, Fill=None
   131→
   132→### 1-3. 코드비하인드 수정 사항 (FrmMain.vb)
   133→
   134→| 항목 | 현재 (NI) | 변경 (ZedGraph/Label) |
   135→|---|---|---|
   136→| `srcGraphXXX.Plots(0).PlotXYAppend(x, y)` | ScatterGraph.PlotXYAppend | `GraphPane.CurveList[n].AddPoint(x, y); zedGraph.Invalidate()` |
   137→| `srcGraphXXX.Plots(0).ClearData()` | 데이터 초기화 | `PointPairList.Clear(); zedGraph.Invalidate()` |
   138→| `srcGraphXXX.XAxes.Item(0).Range = New Range(min, max)` | X축 범위 설정 | `GraphPane.XAxis.Scale.Min/Max` |
   139→| `RangeXXX.XRange = New Range(...)` | 스펙 영역 표시 | `BoxObj` 위치/크기 변경 |
   140→| `RangeXXX.YRange = New Range(...)` | 스펙 영역 표시 | `BoxObj` 위치/크기 변경 |
   141→| `AxCWButton.Value = True/False` | 버튼 색상 변경 (LED) | `Label.BackColor = Color.XXX` |
   142→| `AxCWButton.Caption = "text"` | 텍스트 변경 | `Label.Text = "text"` |
   143→| `AxCWButton.ClickEvent` | 클릭 이벤트 | `Label.Click` 이벤트 |
   144→
   145→### 1-4. DAQmx 사용 (별도 검토 필요)
   146→- **Analog Input**: Dev1/ai0, ai1, ai2 (소음/유량/압력)
   147→- **Analog Output**: Dev1/ao0, ao1 (전압 출력)
   148→- **참고**: DAQmx는 NI 하드웨어 의존이므로 이번 UI 교체와 별개 (컨트롤 교체만 해당)
   149→
   150→---
   151→
   152→## 2. FrmTest
   153→
   154→### AxCWButton → Label (2개)
   155→| 이름 | 용도 | 크기 | 이벤트 |
   156→|---|---|---|---|
   157→| ascButtonTest | 검사 시작 | 213×49 | ClickEvent → Click |
   158→| ascButtonExit | 종료 | 213×49 | ClickEvent → Click |
   159→
   160→### NumericEdit → NumericUpDown (2개)
   161→| 이름 | 용도 | 크기 | 설정 |
   162→|---|---|---|---|
   163→| NumTest | 검사 횟수 | 192×41 | Font=Arial Narrow 22pt Bold, DecimalPlaces=0 |
   164→| NumDelay | 딜레이(초) | 192×41 | Font=Arial Narrow 22pt Bold, DecimalPlaces=0 |
   165→
   166→### 코드비하인드 수정 (FrmTest.vb)
   167→| 현재 | 변경 |
   168→|---|---|
   169→| `ascButtonTest.ClickEvent` | `ascButtonTest.Click` |
   170→| `ascButtonExit.ClickEvent` | `ascButtonExit.Click` |
   171→| `NumTest.Value` (Double) | `NumTest.Value` (Decimal → CInt) |
   172→| `NumDelay.Value` (Double) | `NumDelay.Value` (Decimal → CDbl) |
   173→
   174→---
   175→
   176→## 3. FrmSet
   177→
   178→### AxCWButton → Label (2개)
   179→| 이름 | 용도 | 크기 | 이벤트 |
   180→|---|---|---|---|
   181→| AxCWButton1 | 저장 | 116×49 | ClickEvent → Click |
   182→| ascButtonExit | 종료 | 116×49 | ClickEvent → Click |
   183→
   184→### NumericEdit → NumericUpDown (26개)
   185→| 그룹 | 이름 | 용도 | 공통 설정 |
   186→|---|---|---|---|
   187→| 1차 (5개) | Num_1_AmpMin/Max, Num_1_NoiseMin/Max, Num_1_Time | 전류/소음 스펙, 시간 | Size=97×26, Increment=0.1, DecimalPlaces=1 |
   188→| 2차 (5개) | Num_2_FlowMin/Max, Num_2_NoiseMin/Max, Num_2_Time | 유량/소음 스펙, 시간 | 동일 |

   316→```vb
   317→' NI: srcGraph1Amp.Plots(0).PlotXYAppend(x, y)
   318→' ZedGraph 대응:
   319→Dim list As PointPairList = CType(srcGraph1Amp.GraphPane.CurveList(0).Points, PointPairList)
   320→list.Add(x, y)
   321→srcGraph1Amp.AxisChange()
   322→srcGraph1Amp.Invalidate()

# NI 컨트롤 교체 작업 문서

## 교체 규칙
| NI 컨트롤 | 교체 대상 | 비고 |
|---|---|---|
| AxCWButton | **Label** (BackColor=Gray, ForeColor=Black) | 클릭 이벤트 → Label.Click 으로 변경 |
| ScatterGraph | **ZedGraphControl** | X/Y축 범위, 플롯 동일하게 |
| NumericEdit | **NumericUpDown** | DecimalPlaces=1, Increment=0.1 |

---

## 1. FrmMain — 가장 많은 NI 컨트롤 (약 96개)

### 1-1. AxCWButton → Label (약 70개)

#### 상태 LED (6개) — 25×25 크기
| 이름 | 용도 |
|---|---|
| LedScanner | 스캐너 연결 상태 |
| LedPrinter | 프린터 연결 상태 |
| LedDIO | DIO 연결 상태 |
| LedDIO2 | DIO2 연결 상태 |
| LedDAQ | DAQ 연결 상태 |
| LedSUpply | 공급 상태 |

#### 셀 타입 표시 (1개) — 352×88
| 이름 | 용도 |
|---|---|
| lbCellType | 현재 셀 타입 표시 |

#### 메뉴/동작 버튼 (6개)
| 이름 | 용도 | 크기 |
|---|---|---|
| ascButtonTest | 검사 시작 | 161×49 |
| ascButtonExit | 종료 | 161×49 |
| AxcButtonCountReset | 카운트 리셋 | - |
| axcButtonSearch | 검색 | - |
| axcButtonSIgnal | 신호 | - |
| ascButtonTestSearch | 내구시험 검색 | - |

#### 1차 테스트 표시 (약 20개)
| 패턴 | 이름 | 용도 |
|---|---|---|
| 라벨 | _1st_Lb1 ~ _1st_Lb6 | 1차 테스트 회차 번호 |
| 전류값 | src1Amp1 ~ src1Amp6 | 1차 전류 측정값 표시 |
| 소음값 | src1Noise1 ~ src1Noise6 | 1차 소음 측정값 표시 |
| 판정 | src1AmpDec, src1NoiseDec | 1차 전류/소음 판정 |
| 기타 | AxCWButton13 | - |

#### 2차 테스트 표시 (약 6개)
| 이름 | 용도 |
|---|---|
| src2Noise / src2NoiseSpec / src2NoiseDec | 2차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
| src2Flow / src2FlowSpec / src2FlowDec | 2차 유량 측정/스펙/판정 |

#### 3차 테스트 표시 (약 9개)
| 이름 | 용도 |
|---|---|
| src3Noise / src3NoiseSpec / src3NoiseDec | 3차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
| src3Flow / src3FlowSpec / src3FlowDec | 3차 유량 측정/스펙/판정 |
| src3Amp / src3AmpSpec / src3AmpDec | 3차 전류 측정/스펙/판정 |

#### 4차 테스트 표시 (약 9개)
| 이름 | 용도 |
|---|---|
| src4Noise / src4NoiseSpec / src4NoiseDec | 4차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
| src4Flow / src4FlowSpec / src4FlowDec | 4차 유량(공압) 측정/스펙/판정 |
| src4Amp / src4AmpSpec / src4AmpDec | 4차 전류 측정/스펙/판정 |

#### 5차 테스트 표시 (약 6개)
| 이름 | 용도 |
|---|---|
| src5Noise / src5NoiseSpec / src5NoiseDec | 5차 소음 측정/스펙/판정 |
| src5Flow / src5FlowSpec / src5FlowDec | 5차 유량(공압) 측정/스펙/판정 |

#### 기타 라벨용 (약 10개)
| 이름 |
|---|
| AxCWButton7, 11, 14, 15, 21, 22, 23, 24, 26, 27 |

### 1-2. ScatterGraph → ZedGraphControl (12개)

| 그래프 이름 | Caption | 크기 | Y축 범위 | X축 범위 (런타임) | 플롯 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| srcGraph1Amp | 전류(A) | 763×154 | 0 ~ 1.0 | 0 ~ (_1TestTime*6+8) | ScatterPlot14 + ScatterPlot1 |
| srcGraph1Noise | 소음(dB) | 763×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_1TestTime*6+8) | ScatterPlot13 + ScatterPlot4 |
| srcGraph2Flow | 유량(L/min) | 763×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_2TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot16 + ScatterPlot8 |
| srcGraph2Noise | 소음(dB) | 763×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_2TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot15 + ScatterPlot7 |
| srcGraph3Flow | 유량(L/min) | 252×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_3TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot19 + ScatterPlot2 |
| srcGraph3Noise | 소음(dB) | 505×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_3TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot18 + ScatterPlot3 |
| srcGraph3Amp | 전류(A) | 252×154 | 동적 | 0 ~ (_3TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot17 + ScatterPlot5 |
| srcGraph4Flow | 공압(bar) | 252×154 | 0 ~ 1000.0 | 0 ~ (_4TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot22 + ScatterPlot10 |
| srcGraph4Noise | 소음(dB) | 505×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_4TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot21 + ScatterPlot9 |
| srcGraph4Amp | (없음) | (없음) | 0 ~ 1.0 | 0 ~ (_4TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot20 + ScatterPlot6 |
| srcGraph5Flow | 공압(bar) | 510×154 | 0 ~ 1000.0 | 0 ~ (_5TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot24 + ScatterPlot12 |
| srcGraph5Noise | 소음(dB) | 505×154 | 0 ~ 90.0 | 0 ~ (_5TestTime+1) | ScatterPlot23 + ScatterPlot11 |

#### 그래프 공통 설정 (ZedGraph에 반영 필요)
- Border: Raised → ZedGraph Border 설정
- CaptionFont: Arial Narrow 12pt Bold → Title.FontSpec
- PlotAreaColor: White → Chart.Fill = White
- PlotLine: Black, Width=2.0 → LineItem Color=Black, Width=2.0F
- XAxis MajorDivisions.Interval=1.0 → XAxis.Scale.MajorStep=1.0
- YAxis MajorDivisions.Interval=2.0 → YAxis.Scale.MajorStep=2.0
- Grid: Visible, Color=RGB(224,224,224) → XAxis/YAxis.MajorGrid.Color

#### XYCursor (10개) — ZedGraph에서는 불필요 또는 커스텀 구현
| 이름 | 연결 Plot |
|---|---|
| XyCursor1~5 | ScatterPlot1 (1차 전류 그래프) |
| XyCursor6~10 | ScatterPlot4 (1차 소음 그래프) |

#### XYRangeAnnotation (10개) → ZedGraph BoxObj로 교체
| 이름 | 용도 | X범위 (런타임) | Y범위 (런타임) |
|---|---|---|---|
| Range1Amp | 1차 전류 스펙 | — | — |
| Range1Noise | 1차 소음 스펙 | — | — |
| Range2Flow | 2차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_2TestTime-0.5) | _2FlowMin ~ _2FlowMax |
| Range2Noise | 2차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_2TestTime-0.5) | _2NoiseMin ~ _2NoiseMax |
| Range3Flow | 3차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_3TestTime-0.5) | _3FlowMin ~ _3FlowMax |
| Range3Noise | 3차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_3TestTime-0.5) | _3NoiseMin ~ _3NoiseMax |
| Range3Amp | 3차 전류 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_3TestTime-0.5) | _3AmpMin ~ _3AmpMax |
| Range4Flow | 4차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_4TestTime-0.5) | _4FlowMin ~ _4FlowMax |
| Range4Noise | 4차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_4TestTime-0.5) | _4NoiseMin ~ _4NoiseMax |
| Range4Amp | 4차 전류 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_4TestTime-0.5) | _4AmpMin ~ _4AmpMax |
| Range5Flow | 5차 유량 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_5TestTime-0.5) | _5FlowMin ~ _5FlowMax |
| Range5Noise | 5차 소음 스펙 | 0.5 ~ (_5TestTime-0.5) | _5NoiseMin ~ _5NoiseMax |

> RangeAnnotation 공통: ArrowVisible=False, CaptionVisible=False, RangeFillStyle=None, RangeLineColor=Red
> → ZedGraph BoxObj: Border.Color=Red, Fill=None

### 1-3. 코드비하인드 수정 사항 (FrmMain.vb)

| 항목 | 현재 (NI) | 변경 (ZedGraph/Label) |
|---|---|---|
| `srcGraphXXX.Plots(0).PlotXYAppend(x, y)` | ScatterGraph.PlotXYAppend | `GraphPane.CurveList[n].AddPoint(x, y); zedGraph.Invalidate()` |
| `srcGraphXXX.Plots(0).ClearData()` | 데이터 초기화 | `PointPairList.Clear(); zedGraph.Invalidate()` |
| `srcGraphXXX.XAxes.Item(0).Range = New Range(min, max)` | X축 범위 설정 | `GraphPane.XAxis.Scale.Min/Max` |
| `RangeXXX.XRange = New Range(...)` | 스펙 영역 표시 | `BoxObj` 위치/크기 변경 |
| `RangeXXX.YRange = New Range(...)` | 스펙 영역 표시 | `BoxObj` 위치/크기 변경 |
| `AxCWButton.Value = True/False` | 버튼 색상 변경 (LED) | `Label.BackColor = Color.XXX` |
| `AxCWButton.Caption = "text"` | 텍스트 변경 | `Label.Text = "text"` |
| `AxCWButton.ClickEvent` | 클릭 이벤트 | `Label.Click` 이벤트 |

### 1-4. DAQmx 사용 (별도 검토 필요)
- **Analog Input**: Dev1/ai0, ai1, ai2 (소음/유량/압력)
- **Analog Output**: Dev1/ao0, ao1 (전압 출력)
- **참고**: DAQmx는 NI 하드웨어 의존이므로 이번 UI 교체와 별개 (컨트롤 교체만 해당)

### 코드비하인드 수정 (FrmSIgnal.vb)
| 현재 | 변경 |
|---|---|
| `AxCWButton1.ClickEvent` | `AxCWButton1.Click` |
| `AxCWButton2.ClickEvent` | `AxCWButton2.Click` |
| `SOl1Num.Value` (Double) | `SOl1Num.Value` (Decimal → CDbl) |
| `SOl2Num.Value` (Double) | `SOl2Num.Value` (Decimal → CDbl) |

---

## 7. FrmPart

### AxCWButton → Label (4개)
| 이름 | 용도 | 크기 | 이벤트 |
|---|---|---|---|
| axcButtonADd | 추가 | 161×49 | ClickEvent → Click |
| axcButtonDelete | 삭제 | 161×49 | ClickEvent → Click |
| axcButtonSAve | 저장 | 161×49 | ClickEvent → Click |
| axcButtonClose | 닫기 | 161×49 | ClickEvent → Click |

---

## 8. FrmPassWord

### AxCWButton → Label (1개)
| 이름 | 용도 | 크기 | 이벤트 |
|---|---|---|---|
| axcButtonBasic | 확인 | 161×81 | ClickEvent → Click |

---

## 전체 수량 합계

| 교체 유형 | 수량 | 관련 폼 |
|---|---|---|
| AxCWButton → Label | **약 89개** | 전체 8개 폼 |
| ScatterGraph → ZedGraphControl | **12개** | FrmMain만 |
| ScatterPlot → ZedGraph LineItem | **24개** (그래프당 2개) | FrmMain만 |
| XYCursor → (삭제 또는 커스텀) | **10개** | FrmMain만 |
| XYRangeAnnotation → BoxObj | **10개** | FrmMain만 |
| NumericEdit → NumericUpDown | **30개** | FrmTest(2), FrmSet(26), FrmSIgnal(2) |

## vbproj 참조 제거 대상
```xml
<!-- NuGet/어셈블리 참조 제거 -->
NationalInstruments.Common
NationalInstruments.DAQmx          ← DAQ 하드웨어 사용 시 유지
NationalInstruments.DAQmx.ComponentModel  ← 동일
NationalInstruments.UI
NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms

<!-- COM 참조 제거 -->
AxCWUIControlsLib
CWUIControlsLib

<!-- Imports 제거 -->
NationalInstruments
NationalInstruments.UI

<!-- NuGet 추가 -->
ZedGraph (NuGet: ZedGraph 5.1.7)
```

## ZedGraph PlotXYAppend 대응 헬퍼 (참고)
```vb
' NI: srcGraph1Amp.Plots(0).PlotXYAppend(x, y)
' ZedGraph 대응:
Dim list As PointPairList = CType(srcGraph1Amp.GraphPane.CurveList(0).Points, PointPairList)
list.Add(x, y)
srcGraph1Amp.AxisChange()
srcGraph1Amp.Invalidate()
```

file.content:
# FlexCell Grid → DataGridView 변환 가이드

## 개요

FlexCell Grid 컨트롤을 .NET 표준 DataGridView로 교체하는 방법.

- **목적**: FlexCell 라이센스 비용 제거, 설치 없이 배포 가능
- **참조 프로젝트**: MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST / LsuptNoiseTestmx5
- **적용 폼**: FrmPart, FrmSearch, FrmBasic

---

## 1. 프로젝트에서 FlexCell 참조 제거

.vbproj에서 삭제:

```xml
<!-- 삭제 대상 -->
<Reference Include="FlexCell, Version=4.3.7.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=6f86587eb70ee309, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
  <HintPath>..\..\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll</HintPath>
  <Private>True</Private>
</Reference>
```

---

## 2. Designer.vb 수정

### 기존 FlexCell 선언 (삭제)

```vb
Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.FlexGrid
```

### DataGridView로 교체

```vb
Friend WithEvents dgv As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView
```

### InitializeComponent 내 변경

```vb
' 기존 FlexCell 방식 (삭제)
Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.FlexGrid()
Me.Grid1.AllowBigSelection = False
Me.Grid1.ColCount = 10
Me.Grid1.RowCount = 100
' ... 기타 FlexCell 전용 속성

' 새 DataGridView 방식
Me.dgv = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()
Me.dgv.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(x, y)
Me.dgv.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(w, h)
Me.dgv.AllowUserToAddRows = False
Me.dgv.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
Me.dgv.ReadOnly = True
Me.dgv.AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.None
Me.dgv.SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect
Me.dgv.MultiSelect = False
Me.dgv.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.dgv.BackgroundColor = SystemColors.Window
```

---

## 3. 컬럼 구성 방식

### FlexCell 방식 (코드로 직접 셀 접근)

```vb
Grid1.ColCount = 5
Grid1.RowCount = 100
Grid1.SetData(row, col, value)
Dim val = Grid1.GetData(row, col)
```

### DataGridView 방식 (컬럼 정의 후 Row 추가)

#### 컬럼 정의 (InitGrid 서브루틴)

```vb
Sub InitGrid()
    dgv.Columns.Clear()

    ' 일반 텍스트 컬럼
    Dim col1 As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
    col1.Name = "PartNO"
    col1.HeaderText = "파트번호"
    col1.Width = 120
    col1.ReadOnly = True
    dgv.Columns.Add(col1)

    ' 콤보박스 컬럼
    Dim colCombo As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
    colCombo.Name = "Separator"
    colCombo.HeaderText = "구분자"
    colCombo.Width = 70
    colCombo.Items.AddRange(New String() {"A", "@"})
    dgv.Columns.Add(colCombo)

    ' 체크박스 컬럼
    Dim colChk As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
    colChk.Name = "CheckA_L"
    colChk.HeaderText = "A_L"
    colChk.Width = 45
    dgv.Columns.Add(colChk)
End Sub
```

---

## 4. 데이터 로드

### OleDb (Access MDB) 연동

```vb
Sub LoadGrid()
    dgv.Rows.Clear()

    Dim connStr As String = "Provider=Microsoft.Jet.OLEDB.4.0;Data Source=" & mdbPath
    Dim sql As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Basic ORDER BY ID"

    Using conn As New OleDb.OleDbConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        Using da As New OleDb.OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
            Dim dt As New DataTable()
            da.Fill(dt)
            For Each row As DataRow In dt.Rows
                dgv.Rows.Add(row("PartNO"), row("PartName"), ...)
            Next
        End Using
    End Using
End Sub
```

### SQL Server 연동

```vb
Sub LoadGrid()
    dgv.Rows.Clear()

    Dim connStr As String = "Data Source=서버;Initial Catalog=DB명;Integrated Security=True"
    Dim sql As String = "SELECT PartNO, PartName, Separator FROM Table_Part ORDER BY PartNO"

    Using conn As New SqlClient.SqlConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        Using cmd As New SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql, conn)
            Using reader = cmd.ExecuteReader()
                While reader.Read()
                    dgv.Rows.Add(reader("PartNO").ToString(), reader("PartName").ToString(), reader("Separator").ToString())
                End While
            End Using
        End Using
    End Using
End Sub
```

### DataAdapter 자동 바인딩 (FrmSearch 스타일)

```vb
Sub LoadGrid()
    Dim connStr As String = "..."
    Dim sql As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Result"
    Using conn As New OleDb.OleDbConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        Using da As New OleDb.OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
            Dim dt As New DataTable()
            da.Fill(dt)
            dgv.DataSource = dt   ' 자동 컬럼 생성 + 바인딩
        End Using
    End Using
End Sub
```

---

## 5. 데이터 저장

```vb
Sub SaveGrid()
    Dim connStr As String = "..."
    Using conn As New OleDb.OleDbConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        For Each row As DataGridViewRow In dgv.Rows
            Dim partNO = row.Cells("PartNO").Value?.ToString()
            Dim separator = row.Cells("Separator").Value?.ToString()

            Dim sql As String = "UPDATE Table_Part SET Separator=? WHERE PartNO=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDb.OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@sep", separator)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@pno", partNO)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        Next
    End Using
End Sub
```

---

## 6. CSV 내보내기 (FrmSearch 스타일)

```vb
Sub ExportCsv()
    Dim sfd As New SaveFileDialog()
    sfd.Filter = "CSV 파일|*.csv"
    sfd.FileName = "export_" & Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss") & ".csv"
    If sfd.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK Then Return

    Using sw As New IO.StreamWriter(sfd.FileName, False, System.Text.Encoding.UTF8)
        ' 헤더
        Dim headers As New List(Of String)
        For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In dgv.Columns
            headers.Add(col.HeaderText)
        Next
        sw.WriteLine(String.Join(",", headers))

        ' 데이터
        For Each row As DataGridViewRow In dgv.Rows
            Dim vals As New List(Of String)
            For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                vals.Add(If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), ""))
            Next
            sw.WriteLine(String.Join(",", vals))
        Next
    End Using
    MsgBox("내보내기 완료: " & sfd.FileName)
End Sub
```

---

## 7. FlexCell vs DataGridView API 대응표

| FlexCell | DataGridView |
|----------|-------------|
| `Grid1.ColCount = N` | 컬럼 `Add()` N번 |
| `Grid1.RowCount = N` | `Rows.Add()` N번 |
| `Grid1.SetData(r, c, v)` | `dgv.Rows(r).Cells(c).Value = v` |
| `Grid1.GetData(r, c)` | `dgv.Rows(r).Cells(c).Value` |
| `Grid1.Cols(c).Caption = s` | `dgv.Columns(c).HeaderText = s` |
| `Grid1.Cols(c).Width = n` | `dgv.Columns(c).Width = n` |
| `Grid1.Row` (선택 행) | `dgv.CurrentRow.Index` |
| `Grid1.Redraw()` | `dgv.Refresh()` |
| `Grid1.Clear()` | `dgv.Rows.Clear()` |

---

## 8. 주의사항

- **컬럼 자동생성 vs 수동**: `DataSource` 바인딩 시 컬럼 자동 생성. 컬럼 순서/폭 제어가 필요하면 `AutoGenerateColumns = False` 후 수동 정의
- **콤보박스 컬럼 편집**: `DataGridViewComboBoxColumn`은 편집 시 드롭다운 자동 표시됨. `EditingControlShowing` 이벤트 불필요
- **체크박스 컬럼**: `Value` 타입이 `Boolean`이므로 `CBool(cell.Value)` 로 읽기
- **DataGridView ReadOnly**: 전체 ReadOnly면 콤보/체크박스도 편집 불가. 편집 가능 컬럼은 컬럼별 `ReadOnly = False` 설정
- **FlexCell 라이센스 파일**: `FlexCell.lic` 파일이 프로젝트에 있으면 삭제

Public Class FrmPassWord

    Private Sub axcButtonBasic_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonBasic.ClickEvent
        If txtlbPassWord.Text = strPassWord Then
            Me.Close()
            TmpOpenForm.Show()
        Else
            MsgBox("Wrong PassWord !!")
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.Threading

Public Class FrmTest

    Private Timer As New HiResTimer()
    Private wSTep As Double
    Private Sub WriteText(ByVal TargetTextbox As TextBox, ByVal strMsg As String)
        If TargetTextbox.Lines.Length > 12 Then
            TargetTextbox.Text.Remove(0)
        End If
        TargetTextbox.AppendText(strMsg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmTest_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Me.Load
        FlagTest = True
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmTest_Closed(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Me.Closed
        wSTep = 100
        FlagTest = False
    End Sub

    Private Sub Task()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        Dim _1Count As Integer = 0
        Dim ArryCount As Int64 = 0
        Dim CounterAtStart As Int64 = 0
        Dim CounterAtNow As Int64 = 0
        Dim TotalTime As Double
        Dim tCount As Double
        Dim tDelay As Double
        Dim tCycle As Double

        Dim tmpAmpMax As Double = 0
        Dim tmpVoltMax As Double = 0
        Dim strTmp As String
        Do

            If wSTep = 0 Then
                wSTep = 1
            ElseIf wSTep = 1 Then
            ElseIf wSTep = 2 Then
                tCount = 0
                tDelay = NumDelay.Value
                tCycle = NumTest.Value
                FrmMain.DOON(1) '제품 고정 전진
                WriteText(TextboxSystem, "시험 시작")
                wSTep = 5
            ElseIf wSTep = 5 Then
                If IoInput(3) = 1 Then
                    FrmMain.DOOFF(1)
                    FrmMain.DOON(3) '제품고정하강
                    wSTep = 6
                End If
            ElseIf wSTep = 6 Then
                If IoInput(5) = 1 Then
                    FrmMain.DOOFF(3)
                    FrmMain.DOON(7) '전원인가전진
                    wSTep = 10
                End If

            ElseIf wSTep = 10 Then

                CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                FrmMain.DOON(10)
                wSTep = 11

            ElseIf wSTep = 11 Then

                CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
                TotalTime = CDbl(((CounterAtNow - CounterAtStart) * 10000 / Timer.Frequency) / 10000)
                If TotalTime >= tDelay Then
                    FrmMain.DOOFF(10)
                    wSTep = 12
                End If

            ElseIf wSTep = 12 Then

                tmpAmpMax = 0
                tmpVoltMax = 0
                CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                FrmMain.DOON(11)
                wSTep = 13

            ElseIf wSTep = 13 Then

                CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
                TotalTime = CDbl(((CounterAtNow - CounterAtStart) * 10000 / Timer.Frequency) / 10000)

                If tmpAmpMax < FrmMain.ValueAmp Then tmpAmpMax = FrmMain.ValueAmp
                If tmpVoltMax < FrmMain.ValueVolt Then tmpVoltMax = FrmMain.ValueVolt

                If TotalTime >= tDelay Then
                    FrmMain.DOOFF(11)
                    wSTep = 14
                End If

            ElseIf wSTep = 14 Then

                'Label4.Text = CStr(tCount) & " / " & CStr(tCycle)
                '190000 / 200000
                tCount = tCount + 1
                If tCount >= tCycle Then
                    strTmp = Format(Now, "yy-MM-dd") & " " & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "-" & $"Cycle[{tCount.ToString}] Time[{tDelay.ToString}] Amp[{tmpAmpMax.ToString}] Volt[{tmpVoltMax.ToString}]"
                    WriteText(TextboxSystem, strTmp)
                    WriteText(TextboxSystem, "시험 종료 TOTAL CYCLE : " & tCount)
                    FrmMain.InsertDB($"Time[{tDelay.ToString}] Amp[{tmpAmpMax.ToString}] Volt[{tmpVoltMax.ToString}]", tCount.ToString)
                    wSTep = 100
                Else
                    strTmp = Format(Now, "yy-MM-dd") & " " & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "-" & $"Cycle[{tCount.ToString}] Time[{tDelay.ToString}] Amp[{tmpAmpMax.ToString}] Volt[{tmpVoltMax.ToString}]"
                    WriteText(TextboxSystem, strTmp)
                    FrmMain.InsertDB($"Time[{tDelay.ToString}] Amp[{tmpAmpMax.ToString}] Volt[{tmpVoltMax.ToString}]", tCount.ToString)
                    Label4.Text = CStr(tCount) & " / " & CStr(tCycle)
                    wSTep = 10
                End If

            ElseIf wSTep = 100 Then
                Exit Do
            End If
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ascButtonTest_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonTest.ClickEvent
        If NumTest.Value <> 0 And NumDelay.Value <> 0 Then
            wSTep = 2
            Task()
        Else
            MsgBox("검사 횟수,딜레이 설정해주세요.")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub ascButtonExit_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonExit.ClickEvent
        wSTep = 100
    End Sub

End Class

Public Class FrmPart

    Private ShapeIndex As Integer
    Private ClickIndex As Integer

    Private Sub Frmpart_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With Grid1
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None
            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 29
            .Rows = 1
            .Column(1).Locked = False
            .Column(2).Locked = False
            For i As Integer = 0 To 28
                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            Next
            .Column(0).Width = 10
            .Column(1).Width = 0
            .Column(2).Width = 200
            .Column(3).Width = 200
            .Column(4).Width = 100
            .Column(5).Width = 160
            .Column(6).Width = 160
            .Column(7).Width = 160
            .Column(8).Width = 160
            .Column(9).Width = 160
            .Column(10).Width = 160
            .Column(11).Width = 160
            .Column(12).Width = 160
            .Column(13).Width = 160
            .Column(14).Width = 160
            .Column(15).Width = 160
            .Column(16).Width = 160
            .Column(17).Width = 160
            .Column(18).Width = 160
            .Column(19).Width = 160
            .Column(20).Width = 160
            .Column(21).Width = 160
            .Column(22).Width = 160
            .Column(23).Width = 160
            .Column(24).Width = 160
            .Column(25).Width = 160
            .Column(26).Width = 160
            .Column(27).Width = 160
            .Column(28).Width = 160

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "ID"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 3).Text = "품명"
            .Cell(0, 4).Text = "포지션"

            .Cell(0, 5).Text = "1차OpenAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 6).Text = "1차OpenAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 7).Text = "1차OpenTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 8).Text = "1차OpenTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 9).Text = "1차CloseAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 10).Text = "1차CloseAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 11).Text = "2차CloseTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 12).Text = "2차CloseTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 13).Text = "2차OpenAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 14).Text = "2차OpenAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 15).Text = "2차OpenTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 16).Text = "2차OpenTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 17).Text = "2차CloseAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 18).Text = "2차CloseAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 19).Text = "2차CloseTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 20).Text = "2차CloseTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 21).Text = "3차OpenAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 22).Text = "3차OpenAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 23).Text = "3차OpenTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 24).Text = "3차OpenTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 25).Text = "3차CloseAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 26).Text = "3차CloseAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 27).Text = "3차CloseTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 28).Text = "3차CloseTimeMax"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()
        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        InitGrid()
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part ORDER BY LEN(PartNo),PartNo", MdbConnect)
        With Grid1
            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
                MsgBox("Empty Info.")
            Else
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("PartName").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Position").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdTimeMax").Value)

                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            ShapeIndex = Rs.RecordCount
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End With
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveGrid()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part ORDER BY LEN(PArtno),PArtno", MdbConnect)
        With Grid1
            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
                MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                i = 1
                Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text
                Rs.Fields("PartName").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 3).Text
                Rs.Fields("Position").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text

                Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 5).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 6).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 7).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 8).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 9).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 10).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 11).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 12).Text

                Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 13).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 14).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 15).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 16).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 17).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 18).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 19).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 20).Text

                Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 21).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 22).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 23).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 24).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 25).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 26).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 27).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 28).Text

                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                i = 1
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text
                    Rs.Fields("PartName").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 3).Text
                    Rs.Fields("Position").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text

                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 5).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 6).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 7).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 8).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 9).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 10).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 11).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 12).Text

                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 13).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 14).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 15).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 16).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 17).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 18).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 19).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 20).Text

                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 21).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 22).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 23).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 24).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 25).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 26).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 27).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 28).Text
                    Rs.Update()
                    i = i + 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End With
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Delete(ByVal strID)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE ID = " & strID, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Delete()
            Rs.Update()
            ClickIndex = 0
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Grid1_MouseClick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs) Handles Grid1.MouseClick

        If Grid1.Selection.FirstCol = 1 Then
            ClickIndex = Grid1.Selection.FirstRow
        End If

        If Grid1.Selection.FirstCol = 16 Then

            Dim Open As New OpenFileDialog()
            Open.ShowDialog()
            If Open.FileName = "" Then
                Grid1.Cell(Grid1.Selection.FirstRow, Grid1.Selection.FirstCol).Text = "0"
            Else
                Grid1.Cell(Grid1.Selection.FirstRow, Grid1.Selection.FirstCol).Text = Open.FileName
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonADd_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonADd.ClickEvent

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part", MdbConnect)
        Rs.AddNew()
        Rs.Fields("PlcID").Value = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
        Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("PartName").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("TargetScan").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("TargetTool").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdSpecMin").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdSpecMax").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdTimeStart").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdTimeEnd").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdSpecMin").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdSpecMax").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdTimeStart").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdTimeEnd").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("4mCode").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("EoNumber").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Update()
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonDelete_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonDelete.ClickEvent
        If ClickIndex <> 0 Then
            Delete(Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, 1).Text)
            InitGrid()
            LoadGrid()
        Else
            MsgBox("Selct Row")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonSAve_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonSAve.ClickEvent
        SaveGrid()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonClose_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonClose.ClickEvent
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class FrmSearch

    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection

        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (WORKDATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Dim Qurry2 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (WORKDATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND (SerialNo LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()
        Grid3.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid3.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid3.DisplayRowArrow = True
        Grid3.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        If Grid3.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then
            MsgBox("Export Completed.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton1_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton1.ClickEvent
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonSAve_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles axcButtonSAve.ClickEvent
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonClose_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles axcButtonClose.ClickEvent
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmSearch_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Me.Load
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO
Public Class FrmSearch2

    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection

        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Log WHERE (TestDATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"


        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Log")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()
        Grid3.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid3.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid3.DisplayRowArrow = True
        Grid3.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Log")

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = "내구시험_" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        If Grid3.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then
            MsgBox("Export Completed.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton1_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton1.ClickEvent
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonSAve_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles axcButtonSAve.ClickEvent
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonClose_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles axcButtonClose.ClickEvent
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmSearch_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Me.Load
    End Sub

End Class

1→Public Class FrmSeq
     2→
     3→    Private ShapeIndex As Integer
     4→    Private ClickIndex As Integer
     5→    Private CountRow As Integer
     6→
     7→    Private Sub FrmSeq_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load
     8→
     9→        LoadCombobox()
    10→        InitGrid()
    11→
    12→    End Sub
    13→
    14→    Private Sub LoadCombobox()
    15→
    16→        ComboBox2.Items.Clear()
    17→        ComboBox3.Items.Clear()
    18→
    19→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
    20→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
    21→        Dim TmpNewID As String
    22→
    23→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    24→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    25→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
    26→        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID),WORKID", MdbConnect)
    27→
    28→        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
    29→            ComboBox2.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
    30→            ComboBox3.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
    31→        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
    32→            Rs.MoveFirst()
    33→            Do Until Rs.EOF
    34→                ComboBox2.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)

   245→    Private Sub LoadGrid(ByVal strID As String)
   246→
   247→        CountRow = 0
   248→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   249→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   250→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   251→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   252→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   253→        InitGrid()
   254→
   255→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strID & "' ORDER BY SeqID asc", MdbConnect)
   256→
   257→        With Grid1
   258→            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
   259→                MsgBox("Empty Info.")
   260→            Else
   261→                Rs.MoveFirst()
   262→                Do Until Rs.EOF
   263→                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value & Chr(9) & _
   264→                         Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value & Chr(9) & _
   265→                         Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) & _
   266→                         Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value & Chr(9) & _
   267→                         Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value & Chr(9) & _
   268→                         Rs.Fields("Type").Value & Chr(9) & _
   269→                         Rs.Fields("Target").Value & Chr(9) & _
   270→                         Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value & Chr(9) & _
   271→                         Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value & Chr(9) & _
   272→                         Rs.Fields("IN1").Value & Chr(9) & _
   273→                         Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
   274→                         Rs.Fields("IN2").Value & Chr(9) & _
   275→                         Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
   276→                         Rs.Fields("IN3").Value & Chr(9) & _
   277→                         Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
   278→                         Rs.Fields("IN4").Value & Chr(9) & _
   279→                         Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
   280→                         Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value & Chr(9) & _
   281→                         Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
   282→                         Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value & Chr(9) & _
   283→                         Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
   284→                         Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value & Chr(9) & _
   285→                         Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
   286→                         Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value & Chr(9) & _
   287→                         Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
   288→                         Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value & Chr(9) & _
   289→                         Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value & Chr(9) & _
   290→                         Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value & Chr(9) & _
   291→                         Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value)
   292→                    .Column(1).Locked = True
   293→                    .Column(2).Locked = True
   294→                    CountRow = CountRow + 1
   295→                    Rs.MoveNext()
   296→                Loop
   297→            End If
   298→            ShapeIndex = Rs.RecordCount
   299→            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   300→            Rs.Close()
   301→        End With
   302→        ConnectionCloseMDB()
   303→        SetGridColor()
   304→

   413→    Private Function StrConvert(ByVal str As String) As String
   414→
   415→        Dim tmp As String
   416→        If str = "ON" Then
   417→            tmp = "ON"
   418→        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
   419→            tmp = "OFF"
   420→        ElseIf str = "-" Then
   421→            tmp = "-"
   422→        Else
   423→            tmp = "-"
   424→        End If
   425→        Return tmp
   426→
   427→    End Function

Public Class FrmSeq

    Private ShapeIndex As Integer
    Private ClickIndex As Integer
    Private CountRow As Integer

    Private Sub FrmSeq_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        LoadCombobox()
        InitGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadCombobox()

        ComboBox2.Items.Clear()
        ComboBox3.Items.Clear()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpNewID As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID),WORKID", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            ComboBox2.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
            ComboBox3.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                ComboBox2.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                ComboBox3.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 30
            .Rows = 1
            .Column(1).Locked = False
            .Column(2).Locked = False

            For i As Integer = 0 To 29
                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 20
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 50
            .Column(3).Width = 240
            .Column(4).Width = 70
            .Column(5).Width = 110
            .Column(6).Width = 110
            .Column(7).Width = 200
            .Column(8).Width = 140
            .Column(9).Width = 140
            .Column(10).Width = 60
            .Column(11).Width = 80
            .Column(12).Width = 60
            .Column(13).Width = 80
            .Column(14).Width = 60
            .Column(15).Width = 80
            .Column(16).Width = 60
            .Column(17).Width = 80
            .Column(18).Width = 60
            .Column(19).Width = 80
            .Column(20).Width = 60
            .Column(21).Width = 80
            .Column(22).Width = 60
            .Column(23).Width = 80
            .Column(24).Width = 60
            .Column(25).Width = 80
            .Column(26).Width = 190
            .Column(27).Width = 150
            .Column(28).Width = 100
            .Column(29).Width = 150

            .Column(6).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(10).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(11).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(12).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(13).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(14).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(15).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(16).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(17).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(18).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(19).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(20).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(21).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(22).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(23).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(24).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
            .Column(25).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

            .Column(26).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox
            .Column(27).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox

            .Column(28).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "WorkID"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "SeqID"
            .Cell(0, 3).Text = "MESSAGE"
            .Cell(0, 4).Text = "FontSize"
            .Cell(0, 5).Text = "SubImagePath"
            .Cell(0, 6).Text = "Type"
            .Cell(0, 7).Text = "Target"
            .Cell(0, 8).Text = "MainImagePath"
            .Cell(0, 9).Text = "NgImagePath"
            .Cell(0, 10).Text = "Condition1"
            .Cell(0, 11).Text = "State"
            .Cell(0, 12).Text = "Condition2"
            .Cell(0, 13).Text = "State"
            .Cell(0, 14).Text = "Condition3"
            .Cell(0, 15).Text = "State"
            .Cell(0, 16).Text = "Condition4"
            .Cell(0, 17).Text = "State"
            .Cell(0, 18).Text = "Out1"
            .Cell(0, 19).Text = "ON/OFF"
            .Cell(0, 20).Text = "Out2"
            .Cell(0, 21).Text = "ON/OFF"
            .Cell(0, 22).Text = "Out3"
            .Cell(0, 23).Text = "ON/OFF"
            .Cell(0, 24).Text = "Out4"
            .Cell(0, 25).Text = "ON/OFF"
            .Cell(0, 26).Text = "IncludeEndBarcode"
            .Cell(0, 27).Text = "ScanDuplicateCheck"
            .Cell(0, 28).Text = "DataSave"
            .Cell(0, 29).Text = "ColumnName"

            .ComboBox(6).Items.Clear()
            For i = 10 To 25
                .ComboBox(i).Items.Clear()
            Next

            If ComboBox2.Text = "RESET" Then
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("MESSAGE")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("CHECK")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("IOCHECK")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("DELAY")
            Else
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("SCAN")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("SCAN-PRINT")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("MESSAGE")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("CHECK")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TQ TOOL1")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TQ TOOL2")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TQ TOOL3")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TQ TOOL4")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("AIR TOOL")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("BARCODE")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("DELAY")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("RESIST")

                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("SAVECHECK")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TEST")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TEST1")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TEST2")
                .ComboBox(6).Items.Add("TEST3")
            End If
            
            .ComboBox(10).Items.Add("NoUse")
            .ComboBox(12).Items.Add("NoUse")
            .ComboBox(14).Items.Add("NoUse")
            .ComboBox(16).Items.Add("NoUse")
            .ComboBox(18).Items.Add("NoUse")
            .ComboBox(20).Items.Add("NoUse")
            .ComboBox(22).Items.Add("NoUse")
            .ComboBox(24).Items.Add("NoUse")

            .ComboBox(11).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(11).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(11).Items.Add("-")
            .ComboBox(13).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(13).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(13).Items.Add("-")
            .ComboBox(15).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(15).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(15).Items.Add("-")
            .ComboBox(17).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(17).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(17).Items.Add("-")

            For i = 4000 To 4063
                .ComboBox(10).Items.Add(CStr(i))
                .ComboBox(12).Items.Add(CStr(i))
                .ComboBox(14).Items.Add(CStr(i))
                .ComboBox(16).Items.Add(CStr(i))
            Next
            For i = 5000 To 5063
                .ComboBox(18).Items.Add(CStr(i))
                .ComboBox(20).Items.Add(CStr(i))
                .ComboBox(22).Items.Add(CStr(i))
                .ComboBox(24).Items.Add(CStr(i))
            Next

            .ComboBox(18).Items.Add("ALL OFF")

            .ComboBox(19).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(19).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(19).Items.Add("ON 1Sec")
            .ComboBox(19).Items.Add("-")

            .ComboBox(21).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(21).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(21).Items.Add("ON 1Sec")
            .ComboBox(21).Items.Add("-")
            .ComboBox(23).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(23).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(23).Items.Add("ON 1Sec")
            .ComboBox(23).Items.Add("-")
            .ComboBox(25).Items.Add("ON")
            .ComboBox(25).Items.Add("OFF")
            .ComboBox(25).Items.Add("ON 1Sec")
            .ComboBox(25).Items.Add("-")

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadGrid(ByVal strID As String)

        CountRow = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic

    Private Function StrConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String
        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = "ON"
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = "OFF"
        ElseIf str = "-" Then
            tmp = "-"
        Else
            tmp = "-"
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub DeleteID(ByVal strID As String)

        strSQL = "DELETE FROM TABLE_SEQ WHERE WORKID = '" & strID & "'"
        MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub CopyTestID(ByVal fromID As String, ByVal toID As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        For i = 1 To ShapeIndex

                       "'" & toID & "','" &

                                Grid1.Cell(i, 13).Text & "','" &
                                Grid1.Cell(i, 14).Text & "','" &
                                Grid1.Cell(i, 15).Text & "','" &
                                Grid1.Cell(i, 16).Text & "','" &
                                Grid1.Cell(i, 17).Text & "','" &
                                Grid1.Cell(i, 18).Text & "','" &
                                Grid1.Cell(i, 19).Text & "','" &
                                Grid1.Cell(i, 20).Text & "','" &

                                Grid1.Cell(i, 22).Text & "','" &

            MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)

    Private Function str2Bool(ByVal str As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        If str.ToUpper = "TRUE" Then
            tmp = True
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Insert(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)

        Rs.AddNew()

        Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = strWorkID
        Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = CStr(CDbl(strSeqID) + 0.1)
        Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = "30"
        Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
        Rs.Fields("Target").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = False
        Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = False
        'Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = "-"

        Rs.Update()
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Delete(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strWorkID & "' AND SeqID = " & strSeqID, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Delete()
            Rs.Update()
            ClickIndex = 0
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button7_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button7.Click

        MsgBox("New Work ID is " & tmpWorkID)
        Insert(tmpWorkID, 0)
        InitGrid()
        reLoadGrid(tmpWorkID)
        SaveGrid(tmpWorkID)
        LoadCombobox()
        ComboBox2.Text = tmpWorkID

    End Sub

    Private Function GetNewWorkId() As String

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpNewID As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
        TmpNewID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

        Return TmpNewID

    End Function

    Private Sub ButtonDown_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles ButtonDown.Click

        Dim fromTmp(100) As String
        Dim toTmp(100) As String

        Try
            If ClickIndex <> 0 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Cols - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text
                    toTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex + 1, i).Text
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text = toTmp(i)
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex + 1, i).Text = fromTmp(i)
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        
    End Sub

        Dim toTmp(100) As String

            If ClickIndex > 1 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Cols - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text
                    toTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex - 1, i).Text
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text = toTmp(i)
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex - 1, i).Text = fromTmp(i)
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        
    End Sub

        Insert("RESET", 0)

        ComboBox2.Text = "RESET"

Public Class FrmSet

    Private Sub FrmSet_Load(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 1 To 15
            ComboBoxScanner.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBoxPrinter.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBoxDIO.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBoxDIO2.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBoxPowerSupply.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
        Next
        ComboBoxScanner.Text = PortNumberScanner
        ComboBoxPrinter.Text = PortNumberPrinter
        ComboBoxDIO.Text = PortNumberIo
        ComboBoxDIO2.Text = PortNumberIo2
        ComboBoxPowerSupply.Text = PortNumberPowerSupply
        TextBoxPassWord.Text = strPassWord

        Num_1_AmpMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_1AmpMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_1_AmpMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_1AmpMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_1_NoiseMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_1NoiseMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_1_NoiseMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_1NoiseMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_1_Time.Value = CDbl(Format(_1TestTime, "#0.0#"))

        Num_2_FlowMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_2FlowMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_2_FlowMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_2FlowMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_2_NoiseMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_2NoiseMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_2_NoiseMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_2NoiseMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_2_Time.Value = CDbl(Format(_2TestTime, "#0.0#"))
        Num_2_Air.Text = Format(_2Air, "#0.0#")

        Num_3_FlowMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_3FlowMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_3_FlowMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_3FlowMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_3_AmpMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_3AmpMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_3_AmpMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_3AmpMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_3_NoiseMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_3NoiseMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_3_NoiseMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_3NoiseMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_3_Air.Text = CDbl(Format(_3Air, "#0.0#"))
        Num_3_Time.Value = CDbl(Format(_3TestTime, "#0.0#"))

        Num_4_FlowMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_4FlowMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_4_FlowMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_4FlowMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_4_AmpMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_4AmpMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_4_AmpMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_4AmpMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_4_NoiseMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_4NoiseMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_4_NoiseMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_4NoiseMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_4_Air.Text = Format(_4Air, "#0.0#")
        Num_4_Time.Value = CDbl(Format(_4TestTime, "#0.0#"))

        Num_5_FlowMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_5FlowMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_5_FlowMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_5FlowMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_5_NoiseMin.Value = CDbl(Format(_5NoiseMin, "#0.0#"))
        Num_5_NoiseMax.Value = CDbl(Format(_5NoiseMax, "#0.0#"))
        Num_5_Air.Text = Format(_5Air, "#0.0#")
        Num_5_Time.Value = CDbl(Format(_5TestTime, "#0.0#"))

        TextBox1.Text = TargetVolt.ToString()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton1_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton1.ClickEvent

        PortNumberScanner = ComboBoxScanner.Text
        PortNumberPrinter = ComboBoxPrinter.Text
        PortNumberIo = ComboBoxDIO.Text
        PortNumberIo2 = ComboBoxDIO2.Text
        PortNumberPowerSupply = ComboBoxPowerSupply.Text
        strPassWord = TextBoxPassWord.Text

        _1AmpMin = Num_1_AmpMin.Value
        _1AmpMax = Num_1_AmpMax.Value
        _1NoiseMin = Num_1_NoiseMin.Value
        _1NoiseMax = Num_1_NoiseMax.Value
        _1TestTime = Num_1_Time.Value

        _2FlowMin = Num_2_FlowMin.Value
        _2FlowMax = Num_2_FlowMax.Value
        _2NoiseMin = Num_2_NoiseMin.Value
        _2NoiseMax = Num_2_NoiseMax.Value
        _2TestTime = Num_2_Time.Value

        _2Air = CDbl(Num_2_Air.Text)
        _3Air = CDbl(Num_3_Air.Text)
        _4Air = CDbl(Num_4_Air.Text)
        _5Air = CDbl(Num_5_Air.Text)

        _3FlowMin = Num_3_FlowMin.Value
        _3FlowMax = Num_3_FlowMax.Value
        _3AmpMin = Num_3_AmpMin.Value
        _3AmpMax = Num_3_AmpMax.Value
        _3NoiseMin = Num_3_NoiseMin.Value
        _3NoiseMax = Num_3_NoiseMax.Value
        _3TestTime = Num_3_Time.Value


        _4FlowMin = Num_4_FlowMin.Value
        _4FlowMax = Num_4_FlowMax.Value
        _4AmpMin = Num_4_AmpMin.Value
        _4AmpMax = Num_4_AmpMax.Value
        _4NoiseMin = Num_4_NoiseMin.Value
        _4NoiseMax = Num_4_NoiseMax.Value
        _4TestTime = Num_4_Time.Value


        _5FlowMin = Num_5_FlowMin.Value
        _5FlowMax = Num_5_FlowMax.Value
        _5NoiseMin = Num_5_NoiseMin.Value
        _5NoiseMax = Num_5_NoiseMax.Value
        _5TestTime = Num_5_Time.Value

        TargetVolt = CDbl(TextBox1.Text)

        SaveSetData()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ascButtonExit_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles ascButtonExit.ClickEvent
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class

   405→    Private Sub SetPinMap()
   406→
   407→        Dim i As Integer = 0
   408→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   409→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   410→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   411→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   412→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   413→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_IO ORDER BY LEN(ID),ID", MdbConnect)
   414→        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
   415→            Rs.MoveFirst()
   416→            Do Until Rs.EOF
   417→                Try
   418→                    If i < 64 Then
   419→                        TmpInTxt(i).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
   420→                    Else
   421→                        TmpOutTxt(i - 64).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
   422→                    End If
   423→                Catch ex As Exception
   424→                End Try
   425→                i = i + 1
   426→                Rs.MoveNext()
   427→            Loop
   428→        End If
   429→        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   430→        Rs.Close()
   431→        ConnectionCloseMDB()
   432→
   433→    End Sub
   434→
   435→    Private Function ConvertSTr(ByVal strInfo As String) As String
   436→        Dim Tmp As String = ""
   437→        Try
   438→            Tmp = CStr(strInfo)
   439→        Catch ex As Exception
   440→
   441→        End Try
   442→        Return Tmp
   443→    End Function

   445→    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick
   446→
   447→        Dim i As Integer
   448→
   449→        For i = 0 To 31
   450→            TmpIn(i).Text = CStr(IoInput(i))
   451→            If IoInput(i) <> 0 Then
   452→                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.Black
   453→                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White
   454→            Else
   455→                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.White
   456→                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
   457→            End If
   458→        Next
   459→        For i = 0 To 15
   460→            If Mid$(DoutString, i + 2, 1) = "1" Then
   461→                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.Black
   462→                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White
   463→            Else
   464→                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.White
   465→                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.Black

   472→                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White

   475→                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black

   481→                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White

   491→
   492→        Control2IO()
   493→        SetPinMap()
   494→        Timer1.Interval = 100

   496→
   497→        For i As Integer = 0 To 63

   504→
