    Private Function StrConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String
        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = "ON"
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = "OFF"
        ElseIf str = "-" Then
            tmp = "-"
        Else
            tmp = "-"
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub SaveGrid(ByVal strID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strID & "' ORDER BY SeqID asc", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
            MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = GetCellText(0, 1)
            Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = GetCellText(0, 2)
            Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = GetCellText(0, 3)
            Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = GetCellText(0, 4)
            Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = GetCellText(0, 5)
            Rs.Fields("Type").Value = GetCellText(0, 6)
            Rs.Fields("Target").Value = GetCellText(0, 7)
            Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = GetCellText(0, 8)
            Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = GetCellText(0, 9)
            Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = GetCellText(0, 10)
            Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(0, 11))
            Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = GetCellText(0, 12)
            Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(0, 13))
            Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = GetCellText(0, 14)
            Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(0, 15))
            Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = GetCellText(0, 16)
            Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(0, 17))
            Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = GetCellText(0, 18)
            Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(0, 19)
            Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = GetCellText(0, 20)
            Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(0, 21)
            Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = GetCellText(0, 22)
            Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(0, 23)
            Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = GetCellText(0, 24)
            Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(0, 25)
            Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(26).Value)
            Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(27).Value)
            Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = CBool(Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(28).Value)
            Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = GetCellText(0, 29)
            Rs.Update()
        Else
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            i = 0
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = GetCellText(i, 1)
                Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = GetCellText(i, 2)
                Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = GetCellText(i, 3)
                Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = GetCellText(i, 4)
                Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = GetCellText(i, 5)
                Rs.Fields("Type").Value = GetCellText(i, 6)
                Rs.Fields("Target").Value = GetCellText(i, 7)
                Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = GetCellText(i, 8)
                Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = GetCellText(i, 9)
                Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = GetCellText(i, 10)
                Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(i, 11))
                Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = GetCellText(i, 12)
                Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(i, 13))
                Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = GetCellText(i, 14)
                Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(i, 15))
                Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = GetCellText(i, 16)
                Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = StrConvert(GetCellText(i, 17))
                Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = GetCellText(i, 18)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(i, 19)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = GetCellText(i, 20)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(i, 21)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = GetCellText(i, 22)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(i, 23)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = GetCellText(i, 24)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = GetCellText(i, 25)
                Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(26).Value)
                Rs.Fields("duplicateCheck").Value = CBool(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(27).Value)
                Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = CBool(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(28).Value)
                Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = GetCellText(i, 29)
                Rs.Update()
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Grid1_MouseClick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs) Handles Grid1.MouseClick

        If Grid1.CurrentCell IsNot Nothing Then
            Dim colIdx As Integer = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex
            Dim rowIdx As Integer = Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex

            If colIdx = 1 Then
                ClickIndex = rowIdx
            End If

            If colIdx = 5 OrElse colIdx = 8 OrElse colIdx = 9 Then
                Dim Open As New OpenFileDialog()
                Open.ShowDialog()
                If Open.FileName = "" Then
                    Grid1.Rows(rowIdx).Cells(colIdx).Value = "0"
                Else
                    Grid1.Rows(rowIdx).Cells(colIdx).Value = Open.FileName
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        If ComboBox2.Text = ComboBox3.Text Then
            MsgBox("Same ID")
        Else
            If ComboBox2.Text <> "" And ComboBox3.Text <> "" Then
                DeleteID(ComboBox3.Text)
                CopyTestID(ComboBox2.Text, ComboBox3.Text)
                ComboBox3.Text = ""
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DeleteID(ByVal strID As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        strSQL = "DELETE FROM TABLE_SEQ WHERE WORKID = '" & strID & "'"
        MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub CopyTestID(ByVal fromID As String, ByVal toID As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        For i = 0 To ShapeIndex - 1

            strSQL = "INSERT INTO TABLE_SEQ (WorkId,SeqID,WorkInfo,FontSize,ImagePath,Type,Target,MainImagePath,NgImagePath,IN1,IN1_STATE,IN2,IN2_STATE,IN3,IN3_STATE,IN4,IN4_STATE,OUT1,OUT1_ONOFF,OUT2,OUT2_ONOFF,OUT3,OUT3_ONOFF,OUT4,OUT4_ONOFF,IncludeBarcode,DuplicateCheck,DataSave,ColumnName) VALUES (" &
                       "'" & toID & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 2) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 3) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 4) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 5) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 6) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 7) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 8) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 9) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 10) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 11) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 12) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 13) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 14) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 15) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 16) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 17) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 18) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 19) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 20) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 21) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 22) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 23) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 24) & "','" &
                                GetCellText(i, 25) & "'," &
                                CBool(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(26).Value) & "," &
                                CBool(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(27).Value) & "," &
                                CBool(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(28).Value) & ",'" &
                                GetCellText(i, 29) & "')"
            MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
        Next
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        MsgBox("Copy Complete")

    Private Function str2Bool(ByVal str As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        If str.ToUpper = "TRUE" Then
            tmp = True
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Insert(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)

        Rs.AddNew()

        Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = strWorkID
        Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = CStr(CDbl(strSeqID) + 0.1)
        Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = "30"
        Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
        Rs.Fields("Target").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = False
        Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = False
        'Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = "-"

        Rs.Update()
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button5_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button5.Click

        If ClickIndex >= 0 AndAlso Grid1.Rows.Count > 0 Then
            Insert(ComboBox2.Text, GetCellText(ClickIndex, 2))
            InitGrid()
            reLoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
            SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
            ClickIndex = 0
        Else

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button6_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button6.Click

        Try
            If ClickIndex >= 0 AndAlso Grid1.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                Delete(ComboBox2.Text, GetCellText(ClickIndex, 2))
                InitGrid()
                reLoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    Private Sub Delete(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strWorkID & "' AND SeqID = " & strSeqID, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Delete()
            Rs.Update()
            ClickIndex = 0
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button7_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button7.Click

        Dim tmpWorkID As String = GetNewWorkId()
        MsgBox("New Work ID is " & tmpWorkID)
        Insert(tmpWorkID, 0)
        InitGrid()
        reLoadGrid(tmpWorkID)
        SaveGrid(tmpWorkID)
        LoadCombobox()
        ComboBox2.Text = tmpWorkID

    End Sub

    Private Function GetNewWorkId() As String

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpNewID As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
        TmpNewID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

        Return TmpNewID

    End Function

    Private Sub ButtonDown_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles ButtonDown.Click

        Dim fromTmp(100) As String
        Dim toTmp(100) As String

        Try
            If ClickIndex >= 0 AndAlso ClickIndex < Grid1.Rows.Count - 1 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = GetCellText(ClickIndex, i)
                    toTmp(i) = GetCellText(ClickIndex + 1, i)
                    SetCellValue(ClickIndex, i, toTmp(i))
                    SetCellValue(ClickIndex + 1, i, fromTmp(i))
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub ButtonUp_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles ButtonUp.Click

        Dim fromTmp(100) As String
        Dim toTmp(100) As String

        Try

            If ClickIndex > 0 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = GetCellText(ClickIndex, i)
                    toTmp(i) = GetCellText(ClickIndex - 1, i)
                    SetCellValue(ClickIndex, i, toTmp(i))
                    SetCellValue(ClickIndex - 1, i, fromTmp(i))
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub BtnREsetID_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles BtnREsetID.Click

        MsgBox("New Work ID is " & "RESET")
        Insert("RESET", 0)
        InitGrid()
        reLoadGrid("RESET")
        SaveGrid("RESET")
        LoadCombobox()
        ComboBox2.Text = "RESET"

    End Sub

End Class

﻿Public Class FrmSeq

    Private Sub FrmSeq_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        LoadCombobox()

    Private Sub LoadCombobox()

        ComboBox2.Items.Clear()
        ComboBox3.Items.Clear()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpNewID As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID),WORKID", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            ComboBox2.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
            ComboBox3.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                ComboBox2.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                ComboBox3.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadGrid(ByVal strID As String)

        CountRow = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        InitGrid()

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strID & "' ORDER BY SeqID asc", MdbConnect)

        With Grid1
            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
                MsgBox("Empty Info.")
            Else
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("Type").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("Target").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN1").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN2").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN3").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN4").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value & Chr(9) & _
                         Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value)
                    .Column(1).Locked = True
                    .Column(2).Locked = True
                    CountRow = CountRow + 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            ShapeIndex = Rs.RecordCount
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End With
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        SetGridColor()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SetGridColor()

        Try
            For i = 1 To CountRow
                If Grid1.Cell(i, 5).Text <> "0" Then Grid1.Cell(i, 5).BackColor = Color.LightGray
                If Grid1.Cell(i, 7).Text <> "0" Then Grid1.Cell(i, 7).BackColor = Color.LightGray
                If Grid1.Cell(i, 8).Text <> "0" Then Grid1.Cell(i, 8).BackColor = Color.LightGray

    Private Sub Button3_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        If ComboBox2.Text <> "" Then
            LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Function StrConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String
        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = "ON"
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = "OFF"
        ElseIf str = "-" Then
            tmp = "-"
        Else
            tmp = "-"
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub SaveGrid(ByVal strID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strID & "' ORDER BY SeqID asc", MdbConnect)
        With Grid1
            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
                MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

    Private Function str2Bool(ByVal str As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        If str.ToUpper = "TRUE" Then
            tmp = True
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Insert(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)

        Rs.AddNew()

        Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = strWorkID
        Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = CStr(CDbl(strSeqID) + 0.1)
        Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = "30"
        Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
        Rs.Fields("Target").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = False
        Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = False
        'Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = "-"

        Rs.Update()
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button5_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button5.Click

        If ClickIndex <> 0 Then
            Insert(ComboBox2.Text, Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, 2).Text)
            InitGrid()
            reLoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
            SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
            ClickIndex = 0
        Else
            MsgBox("Select Row !")
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button6_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button6.Click

        Try
            If ClickIndex <> 0 Then
                Delete(ComboBox2.Text, Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, 2).Text)
                InitGrid()
                reLoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        
    End Sub

    Private Sub Delete(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strWorkID & "' AND SeqID = " & strSeqID, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Delete()
            Rs.Update()
            ClickIndex = 0
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button7_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button7.Click

        Dim tmpWorkID As String = GetNewWorkId()
        MsgBox("New Work ID is " & tmpWorkID)
        Insert(tmpWorkID, 0)
        InitGrid()
        reLoadGrid(tmpWorkID)
        SaveGrid(tmpWorkID)
        LoadCombobox()
        ComboBox2.Text = tmpWorkID

    End Sub

    Private Function GetNewWorkId() As String

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpNewID As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
        TmpNewID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

        Return TmpNewID

    End Function

    Private Sub ButtonDown_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles ButtonDown.Click

        Dim fromTmp(100) As String
        Dim toTmp(100) As String

        Try
            If ClickIndex <> 0 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Cols - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text
                    toTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex + 1, i).Text
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text = toTmp(i)
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex + 1, i).Text = fromTmp(i)
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        
    End Sub

    Private Sub ButtonUp_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles ButtonUp.Click

        Dim fromTmp(100) As String
        Dim toTmp(100) As String

        Try

            If ClickIndex > 1 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Cols - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text
                    toTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex - 1, i).Text
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text = toTmp(i)
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex - 1, i).Text = fromTmp(i)
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        
    End Sub

    Private Sub BtnREsetID_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles BtnREsetID.Click

        MsgBox("New Work ID is " & "RESET")
        Insert("RESET", 0)
        InitGrid()
        reLoadGrid("RESET")
        SaveGrid("RESET")
        LoadCombobox()
        ComboBox2.Text = "RESET"

    End Sub

End Class

  FrmSet.Designer.vb && echo "FrmSet.Designer.vb sed done"

sed -i '/Me\.Num_[0-9]_.*\.Size = New System\.Drawing\.Size(97, 26)/a\        Me_PLACEHOLDER_.Increment = CDec(0.1)\n        Me_PLACEHOLDER_.DecimalPlaces = 1\n        Me_PLACEHOLDER_.Maximum = New Decimal(New Integer() {100000, 0, 0, 65536})' FrmSet.Designer.vb && echo "step1 done"

content.text: Hmm, that approach with placeholders won't work cleanly. Let me use a Python script to properly add the properties.

input.command:
cd "/c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/리크 검사기 신진&엔케이/신진" && python3 -c "
import re

with open('FrmSet.Designer.vb', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# 먼저 이전 sed가 추가한 잘못된 PLACEHOLDER 라인 제거
content = re.sub(r'\n\s*Me_PLACEHOLDER_\.(Increment|DecimalPlaces|Maximum)[^\n]*', '', content)

# Num_X_* 컨트롤에 Increment/DecimalPlaces/Maximum 추가 (Size 라인 뒤)
def add_nud_props(match):
    line = match.group(0)
    # 컨트롤 이름 추출
    m = re.search(r'Me\.(Num_\d_\w+)\.Size', line)
    if m:
        name = m.group(1)
        return line + '\n        Me.' + name + '.Increment = CDec(0.1)\n        Me.' + name + '.DecimalPlaces = 1\n        Me.' + name + '.Maximum = New Decimal(New Integer() {100000, 0, 0, 65536})'
    return line

content = re.sub(r'Me\.Num_\d_\w+\.Size = New System\.Drawing\.Size\(97, 26\)', add_nud_props, content)

# AxCWButton1 -> Button 속성 추가
content = content.replace(
    \"Me.AxCWButton1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(116, 49)\n        Me.AxCWButton1.TabIndex = 148\",
    \"Me.AxCWButton1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(116, 49)\n        Me.AxCWButton1.TabIndex = 148\n        Me.AxCWButton1.FlatStyle = System.Windows.Forms.FlatStyle.Flat\n        Me.AxCWButton1.Text = \\\"저장\\\"\n        Me.AxCWButton1.UseVisualStyleBackColor = True\"
)

    Private Sub SetPinMap()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_IO ORDER BY LEN(ID),ID", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Try
                    If i < 64 Then
                        TmpInTxt(i).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
                    Else
                        TmpOutTxt(i - 64).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Function ConvertSTr(ByVal strInfo As String) As String
        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Try
            Tmp = CStr(strInfo)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        Return Tmp
    End Function

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 0 To 31
            TmpIn(i).Text = CStr(IoInput(i))
            If IoInput(i) <> 0 Then
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 0 To 15
            If Mid$(DoutString, i + 2, 1) = "1" Then
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 31 To 63
            TmpIn(i).Text = CStr(IoInput(i))
            If IoInput(i) <> 0 Then
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 16 To 31
            If Mid$(DoutString2, i - 16 + 2, 1) = "1" Then
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmSIgnal_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Control2IO()
        SetPinMap()
        Timer1.Interval = 100
        Timer1.Start()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 63
            AddHandler TmpOut(i).Click, AddressOf Me.lbClick
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub lbClick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs)

        For i = 0 To 31
            If sender Is TmpOut(i) Then
                If sender.BackColor = Color.Black Then
                    FrmMain.DOOFF(i)
                Else
                    FrmMain.DOON(i)
                End If
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveSet()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_IO ORDER BY LEN(ID),ID", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Try
                    If i < 64 Then
                        Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value = TmpInTxt(i).Text
                    Else
                        Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value = TmpOutTxt(i - 64).Text
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonSAve_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonSAve.ClickEvent
        SaveSet()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonClose_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonClose.ClickEvent
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton1_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton1.ClickEvent
        If SOl1Num.Value > 1 Then
            MsgBox("Under 1 kgf.cm")
        Else
            FrmMain.SetVoltage(0, CDbl(SOl1Num.Value))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton2_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton2.ClickEvent
        If SOl2Num.Value > 1 Then
            MsgBox("Under 1 kgf.cm")
        Else
            FrmMain.SetVoltage(1, CDbl(SOl2Num.Value))
        End If

    End Sub

End Class

    Private Sub SetPinMap()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_IO ORDER BY LEN(ID),ID", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Try
                    If i < 64 Then
                        TmpInTxt(i).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
                    Else
                        TmpOutTxt(i - 64).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Function ConvertSTr(ByVal strInfo As String) As String
        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Try
            Tmp = CStr(strInfo)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        Return Tmp
    End Function

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 0 To 31
            TmpIn(i).Text = CStr(IoInput(i))
            If IoInput(i) <> 0 Then
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 0 To 15
            If Mid$(DoutString, i + 2, 1) = "1" Then
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 31 To 63
            TmpIn(i).Text = CStr(IoInput(i))
            If IoInput(i) <> 0 Then
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 16 To 31
            If Mid$(DoutString2, i - 16 + 2, 1) = "1" Then
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmSIgnal_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Control2IO()
        SetPinMap()
        Timer1.Interval = 100
        Timer1.Start()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 63
            AddHandler TmpOut(i).Click, AddressOf Me.lbClick
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub lbClick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs)

        For i = 0 To 31
            If sender Is TmpOut(i) Then
                If sender.BackColor = Color.Black Then
                    FrmMain.DOOFF(i)
                Else
                    FrmMain.DOON(i)
                End If
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveSet()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_IO ORDER BY LEN(ID),ID", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Try
                    If i < 64 Then
                        Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value = TmpInTxt(i).Text
                    Else
                        Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value = TmpOutTxt(i - 64).Text
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonSAve_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonSAve.Click
        SaveSet()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonClose_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonClose.ClickEvent
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton1_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton1.ClickEvent
        If SOl1Num.Value > 1 Then
            MsgBox("Under 1 kgf.cm")
        Else
            FrmMain.SetVoltage(0, CDbl(SOl1Num.Value))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton2_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton2.ClickEvent
        If SOl2Num.Value > 1 Then
            MsgBox("Under 1 kgf.cm")
        Else
            FrmMain.SetVoltage(1, CDbl(SOl2Num.Value))
        End If

    End Sub

End Class

    Private Sub SetPinMap()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_IO ORDER BY LEN(ID),ID", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Try
                    If i < 64 Then
                        TmpInTxt(i).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
                    Else
                        TmpOutTxt(i - 64).Text = ConvertSTr(Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value)
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Function ConvertSTr(ByVal strInfo As String) As String
        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Try
            Tmp = CStr(strInfo)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        Return Tmp
    End Function

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 0 To 31
            TmpIn(i).Text = CStr(IoInput(i))
            If IoInput(i) <> 0 Then
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 0 To 15
            If Mid$(DoutString, i + 2, 1) = "1" Then
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 31 To 63
            TmpIn(i).Text = CStr(IoInput(i))
            If IoInput(i) <> 0 Then
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpIn(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpIn(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next
        For i = 16 To 31
            If Mid$(DoutString2, i - 16 + 2, 1) = "1" Then
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.Black
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                TmpOut(i).BackColor = Color.White
                TmpOut(i).ForeColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmSIgnal_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Control2IO()
        SetPinMap()
        Timer1.Interval = 100
        Timer1.Start()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 63
            AddHandler TmpOut(i).Click, AddressOf Me.lbClick
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub lbClick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs)

        For i = 0 To 31
            If sender Is TmpOut(i) Then
                If sender.BackColor = Color.Black Then
                    FrmMain.DOOFF(i)
                Else
                    FrmMain.DOON(i)
                End If
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveSet()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_IO ORDER BY LEN(ID),ID", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Try
                    If i < 64 Then
                        Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value = TmpInTxt(i).Text
                    Else
                        Rs.Fields("IOINFO").Value = TmpOutTxt(i - 64).Text
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonSAve_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonSAve.Click
        SaveSet()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonClose_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonClose.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton1_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton1.ClickEvent
        If SOl1Num.Value > 1 Then
            MsgBox("Under 1 kgf.cm")
        Else
            FrmMain.SetVoltage(0, CDbl(SOl1Num.Value))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton2_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles AxCWButton2.ClickEvent
        If SOl2Num.Value > 1 Then
            MsgBox("Under 1 kgf.cm")
        Else
            FrmMain.SetVoltage(1, CDbl(SOl2Num.Value))
        End If

    End Sub

End Class
